author: @pixelcave_john
text:
Stop generating UI slop.

Your AI can do much much better.

Tailkit's MCP can generate a super modern and crispy User interface for your SaaS in just a few minutes.

It uses a huge handcrafted collection of UI components to build the ideal UI for you, so you can start building from a solid foundation.

Here's your new social media management for agents.
